# Sultan Cement Products

Sultan Cement Products (مصنع سلطان للمنتجات الاسمنتية) is a cement-products factory and building-materials supplier in Misfah As Safil, Muscat, Sultanate of Oman.

## Core products

- Concrete blocks for walls, partitions and general construction.
- Interlock paving tiles for driveways, walkways, courtyards and commercial outdoor areas.
- Concrete kerbstones for roads, parking areas, paths and landscape boundaries.

## Customers and service area

The company serves residential, commercial and infrastructure project requirements in Oman.

## Contact

- Phone and WhatsApp: +968 9417 8871
- Location: F7X6+X5, Misfah As Safil, Muscat, Oman
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/aPfkAR3k5hCSCZeQ8?g_st=iw
- Google rating: 5.0 from 6 public reviews (checked July 2026)

For current sizes, colours, quantities, availability and quotations, contact the company directly.
